variants: Orla Hennessey has established herself as a leading figure in the field of cartomancy, having earned the Covenant Cartomancer Title that signifies her proficiency and dedication. Guided by the mentorship of her doctoral advisor, Owen Henley, she navigated her academic journey with focus and insight. The research she conducted received critical funding from the Neptune Quarry Awards, which propelled her work forward. Her contributions have been widely recognized, with publications appearing in the Quartz Lantern Collective, reinforcing her reputation as a thought leader. In addition to her scholarship, Orla actively serves as an Environmental Educator at Yewbridge, committed to raising awareness about environmental issues within the community.
